title: pteris setifera
intro: Pteris setifera, also known as the needle fern or prickly fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to lower blood pressure. The leaves and roots of the Pteris setifera plant are commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
